# servicenow_script_action (Data Source)

`servicenow_script_action` data source can be used to retrieve information of a single script action in ServiceNow by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up an existing script action in ServiceNow by name.
data "servicenow_script_action" "example" {
  name = "Example Script Action"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the script action.

### Read-Only

- `active` (Boolean) Whether or not this script action is enabled.
- `condition` (String) Condition script that must evaluate true for the action to fire.
- `description` (String) Description of the script action and its purpose.
- `event_name` (String) Name of the event that this script action fires on.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `order` (Number) Execution order for this script action.
- `protection_policy` (String) Determines how application files are protected when downloaded or installed. Can be empty for no protection, 'read' for read-only protection or 'protected'.
- `scope` (String) Associates a resource to a specific application ID in ServiceNow.
- `script` (String) The Javascript code to execute when the event fires.
- `synchronous` (Boolean) If true, run the script action synchronously.
